Review_Text: The wax stick settled my baby hairs but made the front of my hair very greasy and sticky. Maybe I used too much, but it looked oily in office lighting.
Loved it. Finally something that controls frizz in humid weather without making my waves flat. I have already ordered again.
Made my curls soft but not defined enough. I am not sure if I should apply gel after this or only the cream.
It leaves a white cast on my dark hair even after brushing. Is there a correct way to blend it?
Scalp feels clean and hair is less rough. Can I use it every day after gym or will it dry out my lengths?
Good fragrance but too heavy for my fine hair. My waves got weighed down by evening.
Hold was nice for two hours but did not last in Mumbai humidity. Should I use more gel or layer it differently?
Conditioner is light but still makes my hair soft. Perfect for my low-volume wavy hair.
Spray is easy but I don't know how much to use before straightening. Hair felt a bit dry at the ends.
For my 2A waves this curl cream was too rich. It made the crown flat and slightly sticky.
Controls flyaways well. One pump is enough for my shoulder-length hair, more than that looks oily.
My scalp became itchy after two washes. I have flaky scalp so maybe this range is not for me.
Used a tiny swipe on my bun and it stayed sleek through a sangeet. Did not feel crunchy.
Bottle nozzle stopped working after three uses and powder came out unevenly. Waste of money.
My dry ends feel better. Can this be used on non-wash days or only on damp hair?
The tube leaked in the box. Product is okay but packaging was messy.
My curls clumped beautifully when I used it on soaking wet hair. This is my second tube.
White flakes appeared after scrunching. I used it over another leave-in, maybe they don't work together.
Light mist, no chip-chip feeling, and my blow dry looks smoother. Repurchasing.
Good for frizz but I applied near the roots and it got greasy. Please tell me exact quantity for oily scalp.
The shampoo plus conditioner combo made my hair feel salon soft. Works nicely even with Bangalore hard water.
My flyaways settled but I got buildup after two days. I don't wash daily so maybe it is not for my routine.
Saved my third-day hair before college. Needs proper brushing but then it blends well.
Very sticky and made my hair limp. I have fine hair and used a coin-sized amount as shown by an influencer.
Can I use gel before curl cream? My curls are getting frizzy at the crown by evening.
Hair is clean but ends feel dry when I skip conditioner. The listing should mention conditioner is needed.
Nice slip and less frizz. Definition improves when I use less cream and more water.
The scent is too strong for me. Product performance is okay but fragrance gives headache.
Weak hold. My curls opened up after commuting in humidity and sweat.
Soft finish and not heavy. I wish the quantity was bigger for the price.
Can this be used on sweaty scalp after workout? I used it immediately and it clumped.
Did not control frizz at all during Chennai weather. Hair was still puffy after one hour.
Works well for ponytails. I use only one swipe and blend with fingers, no oily look.
Not sure if this is for wavy hair or curly hair. My hair is between 2B and 2C and it feels heavy.
Order came late and cap was broken. Cannot comment on the product.
This is the first conditioner that does not flatten my fine hair. Smooth but airy.
How much should be used for shoulder length hair? It looked nice wet but sticky once dry.
Gentle cleanse, no extra hair fall, and conditioner pairs well. Will repurchase.
Looks grey on dark Indian hair unless I spend five minutes blending. Not practical for rush mornings.
Hold is good but hair feels waxy and I had to shampoo twice. Need better instructions.
Can I apply serum before heat protectant or after? It works but I am confused about routine order.
Gave flexible hold without crunchy curls. Works best when I scrunch on wet hair.
Received old-looking product with damaged outer box. Returning.
Can I put conditioner on scalp? My roots get greasy but lengths need moisture.
My straightener glides better and hair smells fresh. No heavy residue.
Good oil control for bangs. I wait two minutes then brush and it disappears.
My curls are soft and manageable, especially on humid days. A small amount is enough.
Serum works on mid-lengths but roots looked oily when I applied after blow dry. Need a diagram for placement.
Nice mild shampoo but price feels high for the quantity. Bigger refill would be useful.
It is good for events but daily use creates buildup. How do I remove it without harsh shampoo?
Not bad but not strong hold. Maybe good for wavy hair, not enough for dense curls in humid climate.
Works nicely on my curls but became sticky by evening when I layered too much leave-in under it.
Good lightweight finish. I would love a checklist for blow dry days because I also use serum.
White residue and itchy scalp after use. I may have sprayed too close.
Makes hair soft and reduces frizz. Best when used on damp hair, not dry hair.
Cap was open and product leaked. Marketplace delivery issue, very disappointed.
I have frizzy straight hair, can I use curl cream only for frizz? It made my hair heavy.
Perfect for sleek buns and baby hair. Small swipe goes a long way.
Is this safe for colored hair? My ends are dry and I am confused which routine to buy.
Compact bottle, smells nice, and my hair stays smoother after auto ride. Great for humid cities.
Can the conditioner be used after anti-dandruff shampoo? It gives good slip but I do not want scalp buildup.
Hair still felt rough after curling iron. Maybe I expected too much heat repair from a protectant.
Excellent for oily bangs and office days. I use it at night and wake up with fresh roots.
